channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: 9 SRE principles that cut outages by 60% — ranked by impact
item.description: Cut outages by 60% using 9 ranked SRE principles — error budgets, p99 latency, alert discipline, and more with concrete benchmarks and code examples.

item.title: Build a CLI calculator in Rust under 2 hours
item.description: Build CLI calculator Rust: that’s a 30% improvement over the default. Practical guide with real examples.

item.title: Generative AI and Large Language Models Explained: A Practical Technical Guide
item.description: Cut Generative AI and Large Language Models Explained failures by understanding connection pooling and retry logic — real benchmarks, common mistakes, a…

item.title: 11 Real-World Auth Patterns Tested in 2024
item.description: Cut authentication latency to 112 ms p95 and keep costs under $50/month with these 11 real-world auth patterns tested on a $40 Vultr VPS in Frankfurt.

item.title: The 10 pivotal moments that made Stripe the internet’s payment layer
item.description: Ship payments in an hour with Stripe’s 2.9% fee and 120 ms latency — idempotency keys, Connect marketplaces, and webhooks that don’t disappear

item.title: Build a real-time chat app with WebSockets and Flask in 30 minutes
item.description: Build a real-time chat app with WebSockets and Flask in 30 minutes — 68 ms median latency, $0.05/user/month, no AWS bill required

item.title: How 4-Day Weeks Cut Outage Time by 37% Without Losing Velocity
item.description: Cut mean time to recovery by 37% with a 4-day work week — incident metrics from a live Go microservice show MTTR dropped from 2h to 1h 12m without sacrificing velocity or SLOs.

item.title: We Reduced App Logic by 30% Using Only SQL — Here’s How
item.description: Cut dashboard response time by 99% using only SQL — no ORM, no external SaaS. Sub-40ms p99 latency on 1.2M-row datasets with full GDPR compliance and audit trails.

item.title: AI budgeting cut our monthly overspend by 62% in 90 days
item.description: Cut monthly overspend by 62% using an AI budgeting assistant — 97.9% classification accuracy, 87.5% time saved, and real user results in 90 days.

item.title: 5G vs LTE: What these numbers mean for your app in 2025
item.description: Cut app response time by 79% with 5G mid-band—test data, cost breakdown, and when to ignore the hype. Compare LTE vs 5G for real-time apps, cloud gaming, and IoT in 2025.

item.title: AI’s blind spots finally explained
item.description: Cut AI error rates by 63% with per-output instrumentation and human review — Jakarta e-commerce measured 12% factual errors, Dublin SaaS saw 8% support answer contradictions — measure before you fix

item.title: Burnout isn’t about hours — it’s about irreversible design decisions
item.description: Cut team burnout by 60% by reducing irreversible technical decisions — modular architecture, observability, and automation benchmarks with real failure scenarios. developer burnout prevention guide for startups and enterprises.

item.title: Tech promotions finally explained — what actually moves the needle
item.description: Ship 3 high-impact projects that measurably improve team KPIs and get promoted in 12 months — impact summaries, leverage scores, and the metrics that actually move the needle

item.title: Mobile app security flaws finally explained
item.description: Cut mobile fraud losses by 80% with three concrete steps — hard-coded secrets removed, TLS 1.3 + pinning enabled, and remote attestation added — measured on real apps with benchmarks under 100 ms overhead.

item.title: Evidently vs Arize: AI drift detection in production
item.description: Evidently flags drift in 180ms vs Arize’s 420ms and costs $936/year vs $30k for Arize — choose Evidently for CI/CD integration and cost control, Arize for managed SLAs and low false positives.

item.title: How we replaced $8k/month in SaaS with free AI tools — and saved 300 hours
item.description: Cut monthly SaaS spend from $8,240 to $197 using free AI tools — and saved 300 engineering hours. See the exact prompts, budgets, and latency drops that made it work.

item.title: These 5 Skills Will Make You Obsolete by 2030
item.description: Avoid learning skills that will be worthless in 5 years — pick industry-specific problems instead. Learn how to future-proof your career with domain expertise, not framework deep dives.

item.title: Your database is too big — split it now or regret it later
item.description: Cut 120 ms p99 latency to 25 ms and scale to 4,200 QPS by splitting PostgreSQL into 8 shards — shard key pitfalls, Vitess resharding times, and the one CLI tool that saved 6 hours of downtime.

item.title: Why 'command not found' still appears after installing a CLI tool (and how to fix it)
item.description: Cut debugging time by 70% with these command-line tool fixes — command not found, shell hash cache, and PATH issues demystified with exact commands and benchmarks.

item.title: The 10-hour AI workflow that actually works
item.description: Cut manual indexing time by 15 hours a month with a local AI workflow that watches folders, OCRs files, and searches in under 10 seconds — no cloud bill, no LLM hallucinations, just a 2020 MacBook Pro.
